summary: A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000001) of type Type-A has been filed regarding a transaction between customer John Jensen and counterparty Jeremy Martinez. The transaction involved a cash deposit transfer of NPR 535368.64 on 2022-10-07. The transaction was facilitated through accounts NP00000000003412850188 and NP00000000003980427782 at banks PCBL and SBL, respectively. The countries involved include GB. The transaction has been flagged as suspicious, with the narrative simply stating that a suspicious transaction was observed, without providing further details on the nature of the suspicion. All relevant information, including customer and counterparty names, bank names, transaction amount, date, and account numbers, has been included in this report.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000002) was filed for Sally Dominguez's account (NP00000000000983174071) at ADBL, which showed a cash withdrawal transfer of NPR 21,807.13 to Henry King's account (NP00000000000894070684) at HBL on 2022-10-07. The transaction was part of a cross-border transfer between GB and IN. The customer's declared income profile appears inconsistent with the transaction velocity and aggregate value. No adverse media or sanctions matches were found, but the transactions were executed in rapid succession, with some below reporting thresholds. The report was submitted for further analysis due to these unusual patterns, with the customer having been with the institution for some years. The transaction details and customer information have been provided for review, with all relevant information included in this report.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000003, Type-B) was filed regarding customer Cook, Flores and Ray, who conducted a cross-border transfer of NPR 1214019.81 to counterparty Chad Mccarty on 2022-10-07. The transaction involved accounts NP00000000002968635055 and NP00000000000310823462 at banks KUMARI and SBL, respectively, with countries involved being GB and MX. The transaction mode was a cross-border transfer, prompting a review due to the velocity and aggregate value of funds not being fully consistent with the customer's declared income profile. The customer has been with the institution for some years, and no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified, but the pattern of transfers appears to have been deliberately kept below reporting thresholds, executed in rapid succession.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000004) was filed for Robert King's account at PRABHU, which involved a cross-border transfer of NPR 813935.97 to Sarah English on 2022-10-07. The transaction was routed through account numbers NP00000000001187666276 and NP00000000004011650754, and involved banks PRABHU and LAXMI, with countries involved being GB and NG. The report was triggered by an internal threshold alert and the compliance desk's review found the transaction amount and velocity to be not fully consistent with the customer's declared income profile. The customer has been with the institution for some years and no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified, but the pattern of transfers appears to be consistent with structuring, prompting the report to be submitted for further analysis.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000005) of type Type-A has been filed regarding a transaction between Porter LLC and Terrence Davis. The transaction occurred on 2022-10-07, involving a debit card transfer of NPR 1610735.12 through MEGA bank. The transaction involved account numbers NP00000000003628175933 and NP00000000003038338293. The countries involved include GB. The reason for the filing is a suspicious transaction observed, however, no additional details are provided. The report is based on available information and does not imply any wrongdoing. Further review may be necessary to determine the nature of the transaction.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000006) was filed for customer Robert Gould due to a transaction that triggered an internal threshold alert. On 2022-10-07, Gould conducted a cross-border transfer of NPR 668845.78 to counterparty Kathy Haynes, involving accounts NP00000000001348531196 and NP00000000000326679535 at banks PRABHU and KUMARI. The transaction was routed between countries GB and US. The amount and velocity of the transfer were deemed not fully consistent with Gould's declared income profile. The report was submitted for further analysis due to the pattern of transfers, which were executed in rapid succession and appeared to be deliberately kept below reporting thresholds. No adverse media or sanctions matches were identified, and the customer has been with the institution for some years.
